prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_1: large purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_2: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: small gray metal sphere
  - obj_8: small yellow metal sphere
  - obj_9: large purple metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0261] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0262] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0263] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0269] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0270] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0271] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0272] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0273] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0274] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0275] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0276] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0277] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0278] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0279] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0280] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
